scripts.preinstall:
node -e "const a=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'';if(a.startsWith('npm/')||a.startsWith('yarn/')||a.startsWith('bun/')){console.error('
Error: Use pnpm to install dependencies (npm/yarn/bun are not allowed).
  Run: pnpm install
');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build:deploy: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @tomehq/docs build && rm -rf packages/landing/public/docs && cp -r packages/docs/out packages/landing/public/docs && pnpm --filter @tomehq/dashboard build && rm -rf packages/landing/public/dashboard && cp -r packages/dashboard/dist packages/landing/public/dashboard && cd packages/landing && npx vite build
